data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for retrieving and managing visitor information. Published API scope centers on administrative records and workflow lifecycle operations.
buyer_guidance: Use these APIs for access, visitor, or workflow administration in Building X. They are operational write surfaces rather than monitoring feeds.
overview: RESTful API for retrieving and managing visitor information. These surfaces are administrative or workflow APIs rather than asset or telemetry feeds, but they do support authoritative record updates. Asset data is N/A. Telemetry data is N/A. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope centers on administrative records and workflow lifecycle operations.

ingest_considerations: The published surface includes mutation or submission capabilities, so integrations should enforce explicit governance around which upstream systems are allowed to write.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Visitor Manager API.
